name: Chocolate Chip Banana Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces (1 cup) Semi sweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt; make a well in the center.
3. In another bowl, mix milk, mashed bananas, melted butter, and eggs. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients in the larger bowl. Stir until just moistened.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and nuts (1/2 cup). Pour batter into greased or paper-lined muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
5. Sprinkle approximately 1 teaspoon chopped nuts over each muffin.
6. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool for 5 minutes before removing from pans.
7. Makes 9 standard-sized (3-inch) muffins.
